assets.caption: The scene is a cozy and enchanting forest dwelling, rendered in a painterly style with rich, warm autumnal tones, evoking a sense of rustic charm and comfort. The overall mood is magical and inviting, as if stepping into a storybook. The interior space is carved directly from the roots and trunks of ancient trees, forming organic walls and ceiling structures intricately interwoven with vibrant red and orange leaves that suggest a perpetual autumn. The floor is made of uneven stone tiles, interspersed with more fallen leaves, creating a soft, natural carpet. Round windows, reminiscent of hobbit-hole architecture, are strategically placed, offering glimpses of a sun-drenched forest beyond. A wooden desk laden with alchemical bottles, candles, and ancient books occupies one corner, hinting at studies or mystical practices. Built-in wooden shelves filled with more bottles and tomes are nestled into the tree-lined walls, emphasizing the dwelling's integration with nature. A large, plush bed with an inviting orange blanket is situated beneath one of the circular windows, bathed in a soft, warm light. In another section, a comfortable armchair sits by another window, creating a serene reading nook or contemplation space. The natural wood grain of the tree-walls is visible throughout, providing texture and depth to the interior design. The 360 scene is faultless.
